\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Homogeneous 3D domain with in‑plane periodicity (derived from \doxylink{classDomainHom3D}{Domain\+Hom3D}). 

This domain models an infinite 2D lattice of identical scatterers (periodic along two lattice vectors lying in a plane). It provides a periodic homogeneous Green\textquotesingle{}s function and reuses the rest of the machinery from \doxylink{classDomainHom3D}{Domain\+Hom3D} (RWGs, formulation, etc.). For now, only 2D periodicity is instantiated; 1D/3D hooks can be added similarly. 

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{DomainHom3DPer_8h_source}{Domain\+Hom3\+DPer.\+h}}.
